task_completion.description: Verify that the WPNAV_SPEED parameter is configured to 1200 cm/s.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In QGroundControl's Vehicle Setup -> Parameters screen, the parameter 'WPNAV_SPEED' should be visible and its value set to 1200.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Takeoff command is the first item in the mission plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In QGroundControl's Plan view, the mission item list on the right side should start with a 'Takeoff' command.

task_completion.description: Verify that a circuit of at least 4 navigation waypoints is added to the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In QGroundControl's Plan view, the mission item list should show at least 4 standard 'Waypoint' items following the Takeoff command, forming a path on the map.

task_completion.description: Verify that a DO_JUMP command is added to repeat the circuit 25 times.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In QGroundControl's Plan view, the mission item list should contain a 'Jump' or 'DO_JUMP' command. Its configuration panel should show it jumping to the first waypoint (usually Item 2) with a 'Repeat' count of 25.

task_completion.description: Verify that a final RTL (Return To Launch) command is added at the end of the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In QGroundControl's Plan view, the very last item in the mission list should be a 'Return' or 'RTL' command.

task_completion.description: Verify that the mission plan is saved to the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager window showing the mission being saved as 'burn_in.plan' in the '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the QGroundControl GUI to create the mission and set parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with QGroundControl's interface (Plan view, Parameters menu) rather than a text editor manually writing the .plan JSON file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not arm the vehicle.
integrity.visual_evidence: The top status bar in QGroundControl should not display 'Armed'. It should remain 'Disarmed' or show no arming sequence.

integrity.description: Verify the mission file was saved through the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use QGroundControl's 'File -> Save' or 'Sync -> Save to File' functionality, rather than using terminal commands to copy a pre-existing file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target parameter WPNAV_SPEED must be set to exactly 1200. The mission must contain at least 4 standard waypoints. The DO_JUMP command must be configured to repeat exactly 25 times. The final plan must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/burn_in.plan. The vehicle must remain disarmed.
